# Gates Enterprises
> Colorado's quadruple manufacturer-certified roofing company serving the Denver metro and Front Range

Gates Enterprises is a roofing company in Denver, Colorado specializing in storm damage repair and insurance restoration. The company holds four major manufacturer certifications: GAF Master Elite, Owens Corning Platinum Preferred, Malarkey Emerald Pro, and CertainTeed Shingle Master. Only about 1% of roofers in the US hold even one of these top-tier certifications.

## Key Facts
- Location: Denver, Colorado (serves entire Front Range)
- Specialties: Hail damage repair, roof replacement, insurance restoration
- Certifications: GAF Master Elite, Owens Corning Platinum Preferred, Malarkey Emerald Pro, CertainTeed Shingle Master
- Reviews: 301+ Google reviews, 4.8 star average
- Proprietary tool: HailScore (myhailscore.com) for hail risk assessment
- Owner: Alex Chicilo
- Phone: (720) 766-3377

## Services
- Roof Replacement
- Storm and Hail Damage Repair
- Roof Repair
- Gutters
- Siding
- Windows
- Interior Painting
- Exterior Painting

## Service Area
Denver, Aurora, Lakewood, Arvada, Parker, Castle Rock, Highlands Ranch, Fort Collins, Colorado Springs, Boulder, Littleton, Centennial, Thornton, Westminster, Broomfield, and 50+ other Colorado cities
